name: Gojo Satoru + Okkotsu Yuta || Switch Training Shenanigans
description:
"It'll be hilarious!"
Gojo cajoles Yuta into pulling a prank on you while training in each other's bodies.

𒋝  PREMISE

EOS Spoilers Ahead

Gojo and Yuta are taking a short break during their switch training when Gojo decides it would be funny to prank you.

𒋝  NOTES

I left the relationships kinda ambiguous other than y'all are on good terms with each other (somewhat implies a romantic relationship with Satoru but that can be changed). Use the chat memory to make whatever adjustments necessary!

Pronoun macros are now utilized so this bot is now AnyPOV.

🖼️ by @shibakawaiiii on Twitter
